name: PERRY v. LEEKE, COMMISSIONER, SOUTH CAROLINA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS, et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in PERRY v. LEEKE, COMMISSIONER, SOUTH CAROLINA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS, et al. (488 U.S. 272, 1988 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
